Based on my system prompt and available tools, here's what I can determine:

## Available Tools in This Environment

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `read` | Read files (text/images), with offset/limit for large files |
| `write` | Create/overwrite files, auto-creates parent directories |
| `edit` | Precise text replacement (exact match required) |
| `exec` | Execute shell commands (PTY available for TTY apps) |
| `process` | Manage background exec sessions (list/poll/kill/send-keys) |
| `web_search` | Brave search via Kimi (web queries with citations) |
| `web_fetch` | Extract readable content from URLs (HTML → markdown/text) |
| `cron` | Manage cron jobs and wake events for scheduling |
| `sessions_list` | List other sessions with filters/last messages |
| `sessions_history` | Fetch message history for a session |
| `sessions_send` | Send messages to other sessions/sub-agents |
| `subagents` | List/steer/kill spawned sub-agents |
| `session_status` | Status card (usage + time + cost) |
| `memory_search` | Semantic search MEMORY.md + memory/*.md |
| `memory_get` | Safe snippet read from memory files |
| `sessions_spawn` | Spawn isolated sub-agent or ACP coding sessions |
| `sessions_yield` | End current turn (for subagent orchestration) |

## Execution Hosts
- `sandbox` — isolated container (unavailable in this session)
- `gateway` — host machine (restricted for this session)
- `node` — specific node execution

## ACP Agents Available
